category_sources: source_facts.description says converts Microsoft Office docx documents to text; official homepage https://docx2txt.sourceforge.net/ describes conversion of DOCX to equivalent text documents.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is docx2txt; official homepage title and SourceForge project page use docx2txt.
docs_sources: Official homepage at https://docx2txt.sourceforge.net/ is the best documentation surface and states released package contains further documentation.
repo_sources: Official homepage Download section links to CVS @ Sourceforge.net as the source-control surface.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies DOCX-to-text conversion; official homepage lists text extraction features and Perl command-line implementation.
